compiled_state.title: EV-2c: remove dead internal flags + self-resolve subprocess CLI/wordlist handoffs
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Internal/dead env-var removals + subprocess self-resolution (slice of EV-2 / 77aa). None are user knobs; none change documented behavior, so this lands independently without breaking the app.

## Scope / Deliverables
- Remove _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO (src/rebar/_store/event_append.py): dead never-set flag; the gc.auto value-check already avoids the redundant git config write.
- Remove TICKET_SYNC_CMD (src/rebar/_commands/compact.py): dead shell=True 'ticket sync' shell-out (no such subcommand -> 127 -> no-op). Replace sync-before-compact with a direct in-process pull (reads.ensure_fresh) or drop it.
- Param-ify REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE: src/rebar/__init__.py stops round-tripping intent through os.environ; read paths pass no_mutate=True via the existing scan parameter; CLI fsck (src/rebar/_commands/fsck.py) always mutates.
- Self-resolve REBAR_TICKET_CLI: src/rebar/_engine.py engine_env stops pinning it; reconciler/validate subprocess readers (applier.py, reconcile.py, invariants.py) call in_process_cli() directly.
- Self-resolve TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH: engine_env stops pinning it; subprocesses resolve via reducer/_alias.wordlist_path() directly.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All five vars removed from src; subprocess handoffs self-resolve via in_process_cli()/wordlist_path()
- [ ] fsck read-paths use the no_mutate param (no os.environ set/pop); CLI fsck still removes the stale lock
- [ ] sync-before-compact is a direct in-process pull or removed (no shell=True)
- [ ] Full non-integration suite green; no end-user behavior change

comments.body: DONE (config-loop, commit ca39db45). Behavior-preserving removal of 5 dead/internal env vars; no user-facing change. (1) _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO: dead never-set flag dropped (event_append.py); the gc.auto value-check already skips the redundant git config write. (2) TICKET_SYNC_CMD: dead ticket-sync shell=True shell-out (no such subcommand -> 127 -> no-op) replaced by a direct in-process pull reads.ensure_fresh before the remote-SNAPSHOT short-circuit; drops the shell=True injection smell + vestigial rc gate. (3) REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE: param-ified — fsck_cli takes no_mutate (default False); library fsck(report_only=...) passes no_mutate=report_only directly, no os.environ set/pop; CLI fsck always mutates. (4) REBAR_TICKET_CLI: engine_env no longer pins it; reconciler/validate readers (applier, reconcile, invariants) call in_process_cli() directly. (5) TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH: engine_env no longer pins it; reducer._alias resolves the bundled wordlist directly (verified engine wordlist_path() and _alias resolve to the identical file -> no hex-fallback regression). ACs all met: vars removed + handoffs self-resolve; fsck read-paths use no_mutate param (no env mutation), CLI fsck still removes stale lock; sync-before-compact is a direct in-process pull (no shell=True); full offline suite green (1929 passed, 9 skipped). Tests migrated: TICKET_SYNC_CMD=true -> REBAR_SYNC_PULL=off; alias-backfill monkeypatches the resolver instead of the removed env override; reconcile drops the no-op REBAR_TICKET_CLI setenv. Subagent review: APPROVE, no correctness/behavior bugs; fixed the stale architecture.md mention. Behavior covered by existing tests (now exercising the self-resolved paths). Parent 77aa remains blocked by EV-2a (PROJECT_ROOT) + EV-2b (TICKET_CMD).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
